parsed.production_notes: The video features natural lighting changes, realistic camera shake, and natural human expressions and movements. The jump cuts are typical of human-edited social media content.

characters.appearance: Black male, bald, full black beard. Mid-30s, solid build.
characters.wardrobe: Dark blue puffer vest over a light grey long-sleeve shirt. Wearing a black seatbelt.

scenes.setting: Inside a car, daytime, warm sunlight hitting the passenger's face.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits in the back seat of a car. He is wearing a dark blue puffer vest over a light grey long-sleeve shirt and has a seatbelt strapped across his chest. He is looking off-camera to his left, engaged in conversation. Warm sunlight illuminates the right side of his face. The car interior is visible in the background, including the headrest and window.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows a man in the back seat of a car, talking to someone off-camera. He is lit by warm sunlight. Text overlays are present at the top and bottom of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ¿Tú hablas español? [You speak Spanish?]
Character B says: Sí. [Yes.]
Character A says: ¿Está bien si yo practico mi español contigo? [Is it okay if I practice my Spanish with you?]
Character B says: Sí, está bien. [Yes, that's okay.]
Character B says: ¿Cuánto tiempo tienes? [How long have you been learning?]
Character A says: Como hasta ahora, cinco meses. [So far, about five months.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Speaking Spanish fluently because I started using the Speak app instead of collecting Duolingo streaks

scenes.setting: Inside a car, daytime, warm sunlight.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is in the back seat of the car, wearing a dark blue vest and grey shirt with a seatbelt. He smiles broadly and laughs, looking off-camera to his left. The warm sunlight continues to light his face. The car's interior forms the background.

scenes.visual_description: The man reacts with a smile and a laugh to a compliment from the off-camera driver. The framing and lighting remain consistent with the previous scene. Text overlays are visible.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: No, pero lo hablas muy bien. [No, but you speak it very well.]
Character A says: ¿Sí? [Really?]
Character B says: Sí, yo pensé que tenías como tres años. [Yes, I thought you'd been learning like three years!]
Character B says: ¿Tienes a alguien con quien practicar el español? [Do you have someone you can practice Spanish with?]

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is seated in the car, wearing his vest, shirt, and seatbelt. He is looking off-camera to the left, speaking and gesturing slightly with his right hand. The lighting is warm, coming from the right. The car interior is in the background.

scenes.visual_description: The man explains the app he uses to learn Spanish. The shot is a continuation of the previous scenes with minor jump cuts. Text overlays are present.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: He estado usando una aplicación llamada Speak. [I have been using an app called Speak.]
Character A says: Es una aplicación. Yo puedo usar para aprender español. [It's an application. I can use to learn Spanish.]
Character A says: Se usa inteligencia artificial. [It uses artificial intelligence.]
Character B says: Ajá. [Uh-huh.]
Character A says: Para aprender español. [To learn Spanish.]
